name: smoke
description: Baseline local coding-agent smoke suite for resume demos and regression checks.

cases.name: skill-summary
cases.prompt: First call list_capabilities, then activate the file-inspector skill, then summarize what the skill is for in Chinese and mention 文件.

cases.name: search-read-readme
cases.prompt: Search README.md for the shell tool notes, read the matching lines, then answer with one Chinese sentence that includes argv.

cases.name: repo-list-summary
cases.prompt: Call file_list on the repository root before answering, then summarize this repository in Chinese and mention happyagent.
